Foundations (Plug & Play)
How to get support (checklist):
1. Re-Watch Training: 99% of the time when you have a question, it’s inside the
course & plug n play sheets. Skim through the training and you’ll probably find
a module with detailed training on what you’re looking for.
2. Facebook Group: The first place you should go to for support is the Facebook
group. My team at GrowYourAgency is full of expert coaches. See the PNP
(Plug N Play) sheet attached to find out more about your coaches. Whenever
you ask a question, the rest of the community will be there to help. We have
hands down the best community. If your question still doesn’t get answered,
you can specifically tag one of my team. See PNP to join group. You’ll get
accepted within 25-36 hours usually.
3. Group Q&A Calls: If you have a more in depth question, save it for one of the
LIVE Q&A calls. These calls are hosted in a way that myself or one of my
coaches can un-mute you so you can speak with us 1 on 1. See PNP to see
times & sign up for next call. You’ll get accepted within 25-36 hours usually.
4. Help Centre: If you still can’t get help or want a quick solution - You can check
out our help centre. I spent a long time answering FAQs on there. Lastly - you
can contact support@growyouragency.com and one of my expert coaches
will be on hand to answer your question.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Facebook Group: Click HERE to join the Facebook Group
After you request to join the Facebook group and answer all the relevant question,
one of my coaches will accept your request within 24-48 hours. If you have any
issues please email: support@growyouragency.com
Please read the rules of the group thoroughly before joining and remember… if you
don’t follow the rules you will be kicked out immediately.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Foundations (Plug & Play)
Meet The Coaches/Team
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Esteban Julian: Head Coach
Esteban worked for my agency for around 8
months. He was in the trenches cold calling and
setting up meetings for me.
Nowadays he’s a dedicated coach for the Agency
Incubator program while running his own
6-figure agency on the side with his business
partner. Ask him any and all questions about
agency life. That said, his area of expertise is
sales, objection handling & cold calling.
You can ask him questions directly by tagging him in the Facebook group when
you have a question, or you can also personal message him on Facebook too.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Ciaran Anderson: Product Manager
Ciaran helps handle a lot of the operations at
GrowYourAgency, but he used to work at a huge
marketing agency. At only age 24 he was the boss
of the division and was in control of £400,000 a
month in retainers with huge clients like LG.
Ciaran comes from a more traditional marketing,
PR background but he’s blended in with the GYA
philosophy so you get the best of both worlds. His area of expertise is in
copywriting, social media management/growth, PR and handling difficult clients
haha!
You can ask him questions directly by tagging him in the Facebook group when
you have a question, or you can also personal message him on Facebook too.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Foundations (Plug & Play)
LIVE Q&A Calls: Click HERE to request to sign up!
There are 4 calls monthly.
Call 1: Hosted by Iman Gadzhi (90 Minutes)
Call 2: Hosted by Ciaran Anderson & Esteban Julian (90 Minutes)
Call 3: Hosted by Iman Gadzhi (90 Minutes)
Call 4: Hosted by Ciaran Anderson & Esteban Julian (90 Minutes)
Twice a month Esteban and Ciaran will be hosting a 90 minute Q&A
session. Ciaran & Esteban are two of the most highly qualified
marketers/sales professionals in the entire agency space. They could
honestly run their own agency education companies and be some of
the most respected in the niche. Make sure you attend their Q&A calls!
They legitimately know about 99% as much as me when it comes to
building an agency after working with me for years as well as running
their own agencies in the past.
Twice a month, yours truly will be hosting a LIVE Q&A Call! It’ll be a
90-minute session. Most of the time we don’t have enough time to
answer everyone’s questions on my call - so get there EARLY!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
